utterances.speaker: System Architect
utterances.text: Let's review the proposed system architecture. We have the API gateway, order service, user service, and notification service.

utterances.speaker: Lead Developer
utterances.text: The order service will handle all trading operations. It needs to be highly available and scalable.

utterances.speaker: Database Admin
utterances.text: For the database layer, I recommend using a combination of relational and NoSQL databases for different use cases.

utterances.speaker: DevOps Engineer
utterances.text: We should containerize all services and use Kubernetes for orchestration. This will help with scaling and deployment.

utterances.speaker: System Architect
utterances.text: The system needs to handle 10,000 transactions per second during peak hours. We need proper load balancing.

utterances.speaker: Lead Developer
utterances.text: We'll implement circuit breakers and retry mechanisms to handle service failures gracefully.

utterances.speaker: Database Admin
utterances.text: Database replication and sharding will be necessary to handle the transaction volume.

utterances.speaker: DevOps Engineer
utterances.text: Monitoring and alerting are crucial. We need real-time visibility into system performance and health.
